Query.Sql: -- Query to extract Metastatic Site from the Primary Pathway for HN cancer area from COSD v8. -- MetastaticSite records the site of metastatic disease at patient diagnosis, excluding code 97 (not applicable). -- MetastaticSite will be mapped to a measurement concept in OMOP in a later step. with hn as ( select Record ->> '$.HeadNeck.HeadNeckCore.HeadNeckCoreLinkagePatientId.NHSNumber.@extension' as NhsNumber, Record ->> '$.HeadNeck.HeadNeckCore.HeadNeckCoreLinkageDiagnosticDetails.ClinicalDateCancerDiagnosis' as ClinicalDateCancerDiagnosis, Record ->> '$.HeadNeck.HeadNeckCore.HeadNeckCoreDiagnosis.MetastaticSite.@code' as MetastaticSite from omop_staging.cosd_staging_81 where type = 'HN' ) select distinct NhsNumber, ClinicalDateCancerDiagnosis, MetastaticSite from hn where MetastaticSite is not null and MetastaticSite != '97';

Explanation.Description: DATE OF PRIMARY CANCER DIAGNOSIS (CLINICALLY AGREED) is the date the Primary Cancer was confirmed or the Primary Cancer diagnosis was agreed.
Explanation.Origin: DATE OF PRIMARY CANCER DIAGNOSIS (CLINICALLY AGREED)

Explanation.Description: Is the site of the metastatic disease at PATIENT DIAGNOSIS.
